description_long: This is a medium-sized apple with a predominantly deep red skin, accented by yellowish streaks and speckles, giving it a natural, variegated appearance. The surface is smooth and glossy, reflecting light in several spots, and the apple has a rounded, slightly squat shape with a gentle taper toward the base. A short, brown stem protrudes from the top, set in a shallow dimple. The coloration transitions from a darker red on one side to a more yellowish hue on the opposite side, suggesting natural ripening and sun exposure. The skin appears unbroken and taut, with no visible blemishes or damage. This apple would be commonly found in urban environments such as markets, parks, or on sidewalks.
description: A glossy, red apple with yellow streaks and a short brown stem. The skin is smooth and unblemished, with a natural color gradient.
description_view_0: Mostly deep red with subtle speckles and a visible stem in a shallow dimple.
description_view_1: Red dominates with a hint of yellow streaks on the right side, stem angled left.
description_view_2: Yellowish side with red streaks is most prominent, stem nearly centered.
description_view_3: Red and yellow blend smoothly, with a glossy highlight and stem angled right.
